hero_sub: Discover original cosmetics selected to value every detail of you. Quality, elegance, and care in every product.
about_title: Quality and Elegance in every detail
about_p1: Founded with the purpose of enhancing natural beauty, Vick Cosmetics offers an exclusive curation of the best products on the market.
about_p2: Our mission is to provide a complete care experience, joining sophistication, real results, and the trust of original brands.
products_sub: Selected with care to offer the best in beauty and personal care.
appointments_p: We are ready to assist you. Text us on WhatsApp or fill out the form and we will contact you soon.
form_msg_placeholder: Tell us what you are looking for or when you want your appointment...
benefits_1_desc: We only work with certified brands and 100% original products, ensuring safety and efficacy for your skin.
benefits_2_desc: We ship with agility nationwide. Your order arrives carefully packed and in the shortest possible time.
benefits_3_desc: Our team is ready to help you find the best products for your skin type and needs.
benefits_4_desc: Various forms of payment with total security. Bank transfers, credit, debit, and cash available.
testimonials_sub: More than 2,500 satisfied customers — see what they have to say.
review_1_text: I loved everything! The products arrived super fast and well-packed. The Vitamin C serum transformed my skin. I've already placed my second order!
review_2_text: Incredible service! Vick helped me choose the right foundation for my skin tone. The quality of the products is exactly what I needed.
review_3_text: I always buy here! Original products, great prices, and fast delivery. I recommend it to all my friends without hesitation.
cta_sub: Talk to us on WhatsApp and receive a personalized consultation. We are here to help you find the perfect products.
footer_tagline: Beauty that enhances your essence. Original products, personalized service, and love in every detail.
msg_cart_intro: Hello! I would like to place an order:
msg_cart_footer: Please let me know the payment link and delivery time.
ba_sub: Drag the line to compare the incredible results our treatments provide.
